div.p: Alignment Note: Failure to align __m256 data on a 32-byte boundary when using aligned load instructions will result in a General Protection Fault (#GP).
Latency: ~1-3 cycles Action: Copies YMM[255:128] to an XMM register.
Latency: 0 (Compile-time) Action: Treats YMM as XMM (low 128 bits).
Action: Clears bits [255:128]. Crucial for preventing SSE/AVX transition penalties.

ul.li: XMM0 is physical bits [127:0] of YMM0.
Modifying XMM0 via legacy SSE (non-VEX) instructions zeroes the upper 128 bits [255:128] of YMM0 to maintain compatibility.
Modifying XMM0 via VEX-encoded SSE instructions (e.g., vmovaps) also zeroes the upper bits.
Transitions from Dirty to Legacy SSE trigger a hardware state save (decoding penalty).
